description_long: This object represents an adult human figure in a classic T-pose, with arms extended horizontally and legs straight. The silhouette is slender and proportionate, with clear anatomical features such as a defined head, torso, arms, and legs. The figure appears to be unclothed, with no visible accessories or distinguishing marks, and the surface is uniformly dark and featureless. The posture is upright and balanced, suggesting a neutral, static stance. The overall form is smooth, with no visible textures or surface details. The object is likely intended as a generic representation of a pedestrian adult for urban environments.
description: A smooth, featureless adult human figure in a T-pose, upright and proportionate, with no visible clothing or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full T-pose with arms extended and both legs visible, highlighting the symmetrical silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the profile of the figure, showing the chest, abdomen, and the straight alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the back of the head, torso, and legs, with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile from the other side with the same upright posture.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
